title: murtughas venusta
side_effects: Murtughas venusta can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extract may lead to gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and stomach ulcers. In some cases, improper use of Murtughas venusta can also cause neurological symptoms, such as dizziness, confusion, and even seizures. Furthermore, unregulated use of the plant may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure, diabetes, or heart disease.
